title: Hormel Foods on Track to Match 100% of Domestic Energy Use with Renewable Sourcing by End of 2022
text: Wind and solar projects helping drive the company toward its 20 By 30 Challenge renewable energy goal AUSTIN, Minn. , April 21, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Hormel Foods Corporation (NYSE: HRL), a global branded food company well known for its corporate citizenship, is pleased to announce that it anticipates matching 100% of its domestic energy use with renewable sourcing by the end of 2022.

title: Hormel Foods Pizza Expert Talks Toppings Trends
text: Citrus, fried and lots more plant-based options on the horizon, said Anthony Panichelli AUSTIN, Minn. , April 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Hormel Foods Corporation (NYSE: HRL), a global branded food company and the maker of the best-selling retail pepperoni in the United States, is talking about pizza trends on the heels of its annual showing at the International Pizza Expo in Las Vegas.
